# model_store { #forensicface.model_store }

`model_store`

Model layout resolution helpers.

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [collect_backend_model_files](#forensicface.model_store.collect_backend_model_files) | Collect candidate ONNX files for backend probing. |
| [resolve_quality_model](#forensicface.model_store.resolve_quality_model) | Resolve the CR-FIQA quality model from new or legacy layouts. |
| [resolve_recognition_model](#forensicface.model_store.resolve_recognition_model) | Resolve a recognition ONNX model path from new or legacy layouts. |

### collect_backend_model_files { #forensicface.model_store.collect_backend_model_files }

```python
model_store.collect_backend_model_files(models_root, model_name)
```

Collect candidate ONNX files for backend probing.

The new shared layout is preferred over the legacy per-model layout:
``detection/`` and ``attributes/`` under ``models_root`` are searched
first, followed by ``<models_root>/<model_name>/``. Duplicate filenames are
skipped so a model that exists in both layouts is loaded from the new
shared location only.

### resolve_quality_model { #forensicface.model_store.resolve_quality_model }

```python
model_store.resolve_quality_model(models_root, model_name)
```

Resolve the CR-FIQA quality model from new or legacy layouts.

### resolve_recognition_model { #forensicface.model_store.resolve_recognition_model }

```python
model_store.resolve_recognition_model(models_root, model_name)
```

Resolve a recognition ONNX model path from new or legacy layouts.
